archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Command-center focus, Tactical Minimalist, adapted for DJ Pro Audio)
emotion_and_vibe: Pioneer CDJ pro layout, club energy, confident, high-visibility tactical look. It must feel like professional hardware—raw, functional, and responsive. No unnecessary gradients; use deep neon red glow against obsidian black.

scale.labels: text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#A1A1AA]

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mode B: The Control Room Grid (Data Correlation, Density)
layout_and_spacing.container: h-screen w-full overflow-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white flex flex-col font-sans
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 lg:gap-6 p-4 lg:p-6 h-full

sections.header: h-14 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-[#0A0A0A]
sections.deck_a: col-span-1 lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col gap-4 bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-lg backdrop-blur-xl relative overflow-hidden
sections.mixer_center: col-span-1 lg:col-span-2 flex flex-col gap-6 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-x border-white/5 p-4 items-center justify-between
sections.deck_b: col-span-1 lg:col-span-5 flex flex-col gap-4 bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 p-6 rounded-lg backdrop-blur-xl relative overflow-hidden
sections.library_bottom: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-1/3 bg-[#0A0A0A]/95 border-t border-white/10 backdrop-blur-2xl transform translate-y-full transition-transform (can toggle up)

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Elements in the mixer should be perfectly centered vertically and horizontally.

buttons.play_cue: w-16 h-16 rounded-full border-2 border-white/20 flex items-center justify-center hover:border-[#FF3B00] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_#FF3B00] transition-all bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white
buttons.sync: px-4 py-2 rounded border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#C62800]/20 hover:border-[#C62800] hover:text-[#FF3B00] transition-all
buttons.record: px-6 py-2 rounded border border-[#C62800] bg-[#C62800]/10 text-[#FF3B00] text-sm font-bold uppercase hover:bg-[#C62800] hover:text-white transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(198,40,0,0.3)]

sliders_and_faders.volume_fader: vertical range slider, track bg-white/10, thumb bg-[#A1A1AA] hover:bg-white, with a glowing red fill indicator below the thumb
sliders_and_faders.crossfader: horizontal range slider, track bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 rounded-full h-8, thumb w-12 h-10 bg-[#333] border-2 border-[#A1A1AA] rounded cursor-pointer shadow-[0_0_10px_#C62800] (trail effect via CSS)
sliders_and_faders.eq_knobs: circular elements (SVG or CSS), border-white/20, active track color #C62800, thumb indicator white

visual_elements.waveform: Wavesurfer.js container: waveColor '#C62800', progressColor '#FF3B00', cursorColor '#FFFFFF', barWidth 2, barRadius 2
visual_elements.spinning_vinyl: w-32 h-32 md:w-48 md:h-48 rounded-full border-4 border-[#1A1A1A] shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center bg-black bg-[repeating-radial-gradient(black,black_2px,#1a1a1a_3px,#1a1a1a_4px)]
visual_elements.vinyl_label: w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 rounded-full bg-[#C62800] flex items-center justify-center text-[8px] font-black text-white uppercase tracking-tighter shadow-inner
visual_elements.beat_glow: absolute inset-0 rounded-lg pointer-events-none border border-[#FF3B00] opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-75

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and faders must shift border color to #FF3B00 and add drop-shadow.
motion_and_interactions.active_states: Play/Cue buttons should have a solid #FF3B00 background or intense inset glow when active.

animations.vinyl_spin: animate-spin (linear, 2s duration) toggled via state when playing
animations.beat_pulse: trigger a quick opacity spike to 0.3 on the beat_glow overlay every beat (can be simulated or synced to WebAudio)
animations.waveform_load: fade in (opacity 0 to 1 over 500ms ease-out) when track loaded

surface_strategies.decks: Glassmorphism (The 'Crystal' Variant) - bg-[#141414]/80, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px solid border-white/10. No heavy shadows, rely on the stark contrast of the red waveforms.
surface_strategies.mixer: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look) - Expose the skeleton, solid bg-[#0A0A0A], sharp borders.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text-to-background ratio is > 4.5:1. Use #A1A1AA for secondary text, never darker.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: MUST include data-testid on every control (e.g., data-testid='deck-a-play', data-testid='crossfader', data-testid='eq-high-deck-b').

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react (Play, Pause, SkipForward, Disc3, Settings, Mic, Upload)

dj_mixer_reference.description: Professional DJ mixer texture reference (can be used as a low-opacity background for the mixer section or just for vibe).

vinyl_texture.description: Vinyl grooves reference for the spinning record. Can be used as a CSS background-image inside the spinning_vinyl component.

nu_vibe_logo.description: Neon red atmospheric background, can be used lightly layered behind the main app wrapper for the 'club lighting' reflection.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards for the main DJ layout, construct the decks using raw HTML + Tailwind for exact precision.
Implement the Layout Grid exactly as specified: A 3-column setup (Deck A - Mixer - Deck B) on desktop.
Wavesurfer.js is mandatory for the waveforms. Tie it to the Web Audio API context.
For the EQ knobs, you can use standard <input type='range'> but rotate them vertically, or use a custom SVG rotating knob if possible.
Ensure all controls have 'data-testid' for testing.
Add a 'Desktop Only' full-screen overlay warning for screens < 1024px using standard Tailwind display classes (block lg:hidden).
All text should be unselectable (select-none) to mimic hardware interfaces.
